payload.answer: The same Slack event ID was delivered twice, so treat it as one ingestion and record only one memory: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.

entity_resolution.reason: The event provides only 'Sam from Goldman' and does not include a durable unique identifier; avoid merging with other Sams unless an existing unique matching entity is available.

memory_cards.statement: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.

details: Detected duplicate delivery of the same Slack event ID.
Generated one durable memory candidate only.
Preserved entity ambiguity for Sam and Bill Evans.

repair_options: Deduplicate by Slack event ID and keep a single memory card.
If a duplicate memory was already created from the retry, remove or merge the duplicate while preserving one canonical preference.
Do not increase confidence solely because the same event ID was delivered twice.
